---
title: "Enrico Wegner"
subtitle: "Econometrician | Macroeconomist"
image: assets/profile-img.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Let's Connect
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/enrico-wegner-2bb8a717b/
    - icon: github
      text: Let's Collaborate
      href: https://github.com/enweg
---

## About

I am a **PhD student at Maastricht University**, specialising in macroeconometrics and empirical macroeconomics. My research focuses on **causal inference** and the development of **macroeconometric methods** to better understand how macroeconomic policies are transmitted through the economy.

Currently, I am also a **PhD intern at the Bank of England**, where I contribute to research on the transmission of monetary policy.

Prior to my PhD, I interned and subsequently worked as an **external consultant at the OECD**, within the **Trade and Productivity Statistics Division**. During this time, I worked on the estimation of **international transport and insurance costs**, the construction of **merchandise trade price indices**, and contributed to the development of the **OECD AIS Vessel Tracking Dashboard**.

I am open to **collaborations**, **research discussions**, and **opportunities** related to macroeconomic policy analysis and forecasting. I will be on the 2026/27 job market for positions starting in 2027 and welcome opportunities to connect.

[Download my full CV](assets/CV_Enrico_Wegner.pdf){.cv-btn}
